message: New email from Martin Peers: The Briefing: Apple’s Missing Savant

metadata.subject: The Briefing: Apple’s Missing Savant
metadata.preview: If you’ve ever wondered why Apple has never bought a TV giant like Warner Bros. Discovery, just look at the minidrama over its upcoming Apple TV+ thriller “The Savant.”͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌
